7233.title: Written In Blood
7233.description: Crime novelist Simon Toyne examines some of the darkest real-life crime stories. He investigates the similarities between the works of famous writers and the grim realities of true crime.

7234.title: Judge Judy
7234.description: A young man with two DUIs, who is trying to stay sober, breaks up with his new, live-in girlfriend but suggests that she stay in the other bedroom; he sues her for unpaid rent.

7235.title: Cheaters
7235.description: Pablo is suspicious of wife Patsy's social life, especially after finding hotel receipts in her purse. Lashonda grows tired of partner Glenn's duplicity.

7236.title: World's Most Evil Killers
7236.description: Looking at the life and horrifying crimes of Angel Maturino Reséndiz, also known as the Railroad Killer as most of his crimes were committed near railways as he travelled across the United States.

7237.title: Judge Judy
7237.description: A tenant accuses his landlord of breaking into his home and injuring his dog during a dispute. Then, a teen sues for emotional distress after being accused of injuring a classmate with a box cutter.

7238.title: Judge Judy
7238.description: A man refuses to repay his mother-in-law for a new heating unit. Then, former classmates dispute details of drunken rage and vandalism to a truck.

7239.title: Judge Judy
7239.description: A man sues his ex for half of the cost of a dog and its obedience training. Then, a woman sues her friend's estranged wife for a computer monitor and harassment and a plaintiff sues his nephew's father for medical bills and living expenses.

7240.title: Something's Killing Me
7240.description: Dr. Bill Lidner collapses after returning home from a family trip overseas; his daughters find him bleeding; they don't know it, but it's the first sign that something's very wrong.

7241.title: Operation Repo
7241.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7242.title: Operation Repo
7242.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7243.title: Judge Judy
7243.description: After a man becomes romantically involved with his child's teacher, she accuses him of giving her a disease and mistreating his daughter.

7244.title: Judge Judy
7244.description: A grandmother accuses her daughter-in-law of bringing gangsters to shoot her after a domestic dispute.

7245.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
7245.description: The team head out during low tide to attempt the removal of a damaged pontoon, starting by pumping out the sand that is weighing it down.

7246.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
7246.description: They say, `you can't teach an old dog new tricks', but nobody has said anything about being unable to teach a bounty-hunting Dog new tricks. Which is good because after an eight-season run on A&E, Duane `Dog' Chapman brings his people-tracking skills to a new network, along with wife Beth and their son, Leland. But this time the Chapmans aren't searching for fugitives on their home turf of Hawaii. Instead, they travel to a different city each week and work with the local bondsman offices and bounty hunters, using their years of experience in the business to assist the local agents. The Chapmans motivate and inspire the local bounty hunters while training them how to use high-tech tracking devices and showing them new techniques they can use in finding fugitives.

7247.title: Close Calls On Camera
7247.description: Presenter Nick Knowles tells the emotional story of a dad and his 12-year-old daughter lost overnight on a glacier in freezing temperatures. Plus, a man wakes to find his canal boat is sinking when the bank is breached downstream.

7248.title: Operation Repo
7248.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7249.title: Operation Repo

7250.title: Haunted Case Files
7250.description: Michelle Desrochers' dream trip to Transylvania turns into a nightmare, while in New York, paranormal investigators are attacked by a dangerous entity stalking an old church.

7251.title: Judge Judy
7251.description: A plaintiff regrets helping out his daughter and son-in-law, who resist paying off their debt.

7252.title: Judge Judy
7252.description: A landlord says a couple with seven children and two animals left a house in shambles.

7253.title: Judge Judy
7253.description: Accusations of breaking a lease; a 6-year-old denies crashing into a moving truck with his bicycle.

7255.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
7255.description: The team head out during low tide to attempt the removal of a damaged pontoon, starting by pumping out the sand that is weighing it down.

7256.title: Something's Killing Me
7256.description: Several doctors and CDC authorities spend months trying to figure out what California honeymooners, a surfer in Hawaii and a toddler in Tennessee have in common.

7259.title: Judge Judy
7259.description: A couple who met in a rehab programme dispute their ill baby's exposure to marijuana smoke.

7260.title: Judge Judy
7260.description: A woman says her ex-neighbour assaulted her; he says she came after him with a bat.

7270.title: World's Most Evil Killers
7270.description: Delving into the horrific serial killer Harold Shipman, a trusted GP who murdered at least 215 people, and was found guilty for the murder of 15.

7271.title: Cheaters
7271.description: Ray wonders whether his girlfriend turned down his proposal because her heart lies elsewhere. Rachel finds texts from another woman on her partner's phone.

7272.title: Wives With Knives
7272.description: Transgender woman Terri Pearson is forced to fight for her life after finding romance with a man who abuses her.

7273.title: Paranormal Survivor
7273.description: Monica shares her experiences being stalked by the Grim Reaper; Brittany shares her experiences of torment. A mother and her two daughters share their experiences with an evil lizard-man.
